seoTitle: Silverwood vs Simmie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Silverwood and Simmie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Silverwood and Simmie.
heading: Silverwood vs Simmie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Silverwood, Queensland and Simmie, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Simmie has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Silverwood (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Silverwood or Simmie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Silverwood has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Simmie scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Silverwood scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Simmie scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Silverwood or Simmie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Simmie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
